privileged_info_summary: api.weatherstack.com is a real, publicly accessible weather API service. The task creates a synthetic Android project in /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/WeatherApp with network security configuration. Standard Android paths verified: app/src/main/res/xml/network_security_config.xml and app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml. The emulator localhost alias 10.0.2.2 is correct. However, the certificate pins are incorrect: metadata claims sha256/wJMSn8tj/kCPBXNRsKPJFJvfMM1bFBvLFHlRFiEPbdI= and sha256/x9SZw6TwIqfmVLRDEmFi2yJTMlfn0CfVB3as3wSckOM=, but actual current certificate chain pins are sha256/wfU1Aj9QD5x17KmmexPru50u3aT7lpri2Jtu7wfSGXU= (leaf cert) and sha256/y7xVm0TVJNahMr2sZydE2jQH8SquXV9yLF9seROHHHU= (intermediate). The expiration date is also incorrect: metadata claims 2025-12-31, but the current leaf certificate expires April 14, 2026.
